footer.tagline: Rooted in Quality. Crafted for Excellence. From farm to exceptional coffee.

seo.title: Grind Roots — Premium Coffee Supply from West Java
seo.description: Grind Roots supplies Green, Roasted and Grind coffee beans from West Java. Rooted in Quality. Crafted for Excellence.
seo.openGraphTitle: Grind Roots — From Farm to Exceptional Coffee
seo.openGraphDescription: Integrated coffee supply chain from West Java: green, roasted and ground beans for roasters, cafés and private labels.

hero.description: Grind Roots provides Green Bean, Roasted Bean, and Grind Bean through a fully integrated supply chain—from farm to premium coffee.

heading.before: From West Java soil to a

about.description: We're an integrated coffee supplier rooted in the highlands of West Java. We work directly with partner farmers, process at our workshop, store in climate-controlled warehouses, and deliver green, roasted, and ground beans—ready for your business.

gallery.description: Moments from the field, the workshop and the warehouse.

supplyChain.description: The story stays fixed while each stage moves through the chain, connecting origin, processing, storage, and finished coffee.
supplyChain.mobileDescription: Every stage stays visible and traceable, from farm origin to export-ready coffee.

stages.title: Farm
stages.label: Origin
stages.alt: Farm stage of the Grind Roots supply chain
stages.description: Partner farms across the West Java highlands harvest ripe cherries at altitude for clean, traceable lots.

stages.title: Workshop
stages.label: Processing
stages.alt: Workshop stage of the Grind Roots supply chain
stages.description: Cherries move into controlled processing, sorting, and quality checks before each batch is approved.

stages.title: Warehouse
stages.label: Storage
stages.alt: Warehouse stage of the Grind Roots supply chain
stages.description: Approved lots are stored in export-ready conditions with clear batch visibility and documentation.

stages.title: Green Bean
stages.label: Export grade
stages.alt: Green Bean stage of the Grind Roots supply chain
stages.description: Grade 1 raw beans are prepared for roasters, distributors, and private-label coffee programs.

stages.title: Roasted Bean
stages.label: Profiled roast
stages.alt: Roasted Bean stage of the Grind Roots supply chain
stages.description: Custom roast profiles bring each origin into the right expression for cafes, hotels, and brands.

stages.title: Grind Bean
stages.label: Ready to brew
stages.alt: Grind Bean stage of the Grind Roots supply chain
stages.description: Finished coffee is ground to spec, packed to order, and prepared for smooth fulfillment.

features.title: Farm-to-Business Supply
features.description: Direct sourcing from West Java partner farms.

features.title: Premium Quality Control
features.description: Cupping, grading and defect check on every batch.

features.title: Sustainable Partnerships
features.description: Fair pricing and long-term farmer relationships.

features.title: Flexible Bulk Orders
features.description: From 60kg jute sacks to full container loads.

features.title: Trusted Customer Service
features.description: Direct WhatsApp support with your account lead.

products.description: Every bag is traceable, cupped and quality-scored before it leaves the warehouse.

items.name: Green Bean
items.description: Unroasted, export-grade beans sorted by size, density and defect count.

items.name: Roasted Bean
items.description: Small-batch roasted to your profile—light, medium or dark.

items.name: Grind Bean
items.description: Precisely ground for espresso, drip, moka or French press.

contact.description: Roasters, cafés, distributors and private-label brands—reach out for samples, MOQ and pricing.

form.title: Request a quote
form.subtitle: We reply within one business day.
